prompt: Create a high-end editorial studio portrait of a young woman with an understated luxury fashion mood. Vertical 2:3 crop, waist-up framing, centered slightly to the right. She has shoulder-length softly wavy dark brunette hair parted to one side, natural refined makeup, small stud earrings, clear skin texture, and a warm gentle smile while looking slightly off-camera to the viewer’s left. She wears a premium deep charcoal black knitted crew-neck sweater with visible ribbed texture and relaxed sleeves. Her arms are crossed comfortably over her chest, with one hand resting on the opposite upper arm, and a luxury stainless steel wristwatch with a black dial prominently visible on her wrist as the main detail. Use a muted warm gray studio background with subtle vertical tonal variation, soft directional key light from the front-left, gentle shadows, realistic skin tones, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine photography, quiet confidence, minimalist elegance, no logos, no text, no loud accessories, no harsh contrast.
